form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (17.45) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 1.75 lengths third. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from six starts. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by half a length at this track over 297m (17.25) beating Surely in Grade 5/6 on April 13. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on March 10 over 400m at Mandurah behind Monkey Magic beaten 6 lengths (23.10) in a Grade 5/6. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 4, scoring two times. Go close.
